result.stdout:
SqlServerToMermaid CLI v1.0.0

USAGE
  sql2mermaid <input> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Generate Mermaid ER diagram from SQL Server database or script

PARAMETERS
* input             SQL connection string, path to .sql file, or raw SQL script 

OPTIONS
  -o|--output       Output file path (.md or .mmd). Default: schema.md Default: "schema.md".
  -n|--newline      Custom newline sequence (e.g., \n or \r\n) 
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information.
